## Description

Brief summary of changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `php -l` passes on all PHP files
- [ ] PHPStan passes (`vendor/bin/phpstan analyse`)
- [ ] PHPCS passes (`vendor/bin/phpcs`)
- [ ] Tested on WHMCS 8.x
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets in the code
